svg.title: Simplicity Covenant Enforcement via jet::outputs_hash()
svg.desc: Animated diagram showing how Simplicity enforces covenant constraints on BOTH spending paths (trigger and recovery) through jet::outputs_hash(). Unlike CAT+CSFS where recovery bypasses introspection, Simplicity's compiled DAG program ensures every branch is output-constrained.

g.aria-label: Sig Verify — hot key signature check (trigger path)
Sig Verify — cold key signature check (recovery path)
Constrained — recovery transaction valid but output-constrained
Simplicity Program — compiled DAG containing both spending branches
